seo.metaDescription: Join the premium Summer Camp for AI, coding, public speaking, and future-ready skills.

items.name: TechMNHub Future Skills Summer Camp 2026
items.title: TechMNHub Future Skills Summer Camp 2026
items.subtitle: Future-ready learning for students in Class 6th-12th
items.shortDescription: A premium summer camp for future-ready students.
items.fullDescription: The TechMNHub Future Skills Summer Camp 2026 brings together young learners for hands-on AI, coding, communication and creativity workshops guided by expert mentors.
items.description: A premium summer camp for school students to learn AI, coding, public speaking and future-ready skills through live projects and mentor-led sessions.
items.location: S.D. College of Engineering and Technology,Jansath Road,MUZAFFARNAGAR
items.venue: S.D. College of Engineering and Technology

ticketTypes.name: Basic Pass
ticketTypes.description: Core camp access with guided sessions.

ticketTypes.name: Smart Pass
ticketTypes.description: Includes extra project coaching and activities.

ticketTypes.name: Premium Pass
ticketTypes.description: Full premium experience with mentor clinics.

items.name: ZONEX 2026 - Where Talent Takes Shape
items.location: S.D. College of Engineering and Technology, Jansath Road, Muzaffarnagar
items.venue: S.D. College of Engineering and Technology, Jansath Road
items.description: ZONEX is a one-day skill discovery and opportunity festival bringing together students from multiple colleges and schools to showcase talent in technology, creativity, leadership, performance, and innovation.

ticketTypes.name: Pro Participation
ticketTypes.description: Entry to 2-3 skill zones with event access.
